title: Sistema KLIP IT PLUS Food Storage Containers | 7.5 L Rectangle | Stackable & Airtight Fridge/Freezer Food Box with Lid | BPA-Free Plastic
features: Large, stackable and nestable airtight food storage container
Lid with easy-locking clips and extended flexible airtight seal helps keep food fresher for longer
Modular design stacks to conserve space
Dishwasher (top rack), microwave (without lid), fridge and freezer safe
Designed and made in New Zealand, phthalate and BPA free
description: From the manufacturer Stackable, versatile food storage containers to make life easier Organise your kitchen, pantry and freezer with the Sistema KLIP IT PLUS Rectangular and Square range. Designed with corner shoulders on bases for perfect compact nesting when not in use, plus a built in leak-proof seal*, perfect for keeping your food fresh. Simply fill the container and close the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips. The modular stacking shapes of the Sistema KLIP IT PLUS Rectangular and Square range ensures the most efficient use of space in the fridge, freezer and pantry. It is ideal for organising today's busy kitchen and provides one of the world's most comprehensive food storage solutions. *Excludes some utility lines and sizes above 3.5L. Please refer to product label. Reduce the amount of waste sent to landfills by using reusable storage containers. Store leftovers for an easy quick meal, or freeze for another day. Use for batch cooking and portion control. Storage solutions to suit all your kitchen storage needs Why You'll Love It Space Saving Stacking System A range of different shapes and sizes ensures the most efficient use of space. Compact Nesting Designed with corner shoulders on bases for perfect compact nesting when not in use. Microwave Safe, Dishwasher Safe & Freezer Safe For easy clean up, Sistema KLIP IT PLUS food storage containers and lids can go in the dishwasher (top rack). They can also be stored in the freezer and easily microwaved (without lid) to defrost and reheat. Made in New Zealand Made in New Zealand from Phthalate free and BPA free materials.* * Tested in a Swiss-based accredited laboratory. (Test Report # 2020L38928/1, issued in 2020).
